name: agent-review-pipeline
description: Multi-engine 3-stage code review pipeline â€” auto-routes backendâ†’Codex, frontendâ†’Gemini, with auto-fix loop until PASS

maxIterations.title: Max Iterations
maxIterations.description: Max auto-fix iterations per review stage before escalating to user (0 = unlimited)

failOnError.title: Fail On Error
failOnError.description: If true, abort pipeline on first stage that can't PASS within maxIterations instead of escalating

defaultEngine.title: Default Engine
defaultEngine.description: Engine selection when none specified on CLI. Values: auto (route by file domain), codex, gemini, both

geminiModel.title: Gemini Model
geminiModel.description: Optional -m <model> flag for gemini CLI (e.g. gemini-2.5-pro). Empty = CLI default.
